_comment: One Page Toys — Prize Counter catalog. Spend tickets (earned across the toys) on collectibles you can share in the moment, and on equippable gag effects that run site-wide. To add a prize: append an entry. Fields: id (stable, kebab-case), name, cat (must match a categories[].id), price (tickets), icon (emoji), rarity (common|uncommon|rare|epic|legendary), blurb (shelf copy), share (line printed on the shareable card / brag view), kind ('share' = generates a shareable card, 'keep' = a personal keepsake). Optional: repeatable (true = re-roll/re-draw after owning, e.g. fortunes), equippable (true = has a site-wide effect registered in assets/prizes.js under the SAME id; the store shows an Equip toggle and pulls the effect description from OPT_PRIZES.describe), sub (small line under the name).

categories.name: Screen & Cursor
categories.tagline: Equip it and it follows you everywhere

categories.name: The Big Wall
categories.tagline: What all those tickets were for

items.name: Certified Time-Waster
items.blurb: You came for one minute. You stayed. Wear it proudly.

items.name: Professional Clicker
items.blurb: Thousands of taps, zero regrets. This is a real job now.

items.name: Certified Chill
items.blurb: Unbothered. Moisturized. In your lane. Playing toys.

items.name: Vibe Curator
items.blurb: You don't play toys. You assemble experiences.

items.name: Menace to Productivity
items.blurb: Somewhere, a to-do list is crying. Worth it.

items.name: Reflex Royalty
items.blurb: Faster than a loading spinner. Bow, peasants.

items.name: Gallery Regular
items.blurb: The counter knows your order before you sit down.

items.name: Local Legend
items.blurb: Everyone at the arcade knows your high scores. Everyone.

items.name: Grand Champion
items.blurb: Undisputed. Unbothered. Undefeated (citation needed).

items.name: Ticket Tycoon
items.blurb: You have more tickets than sense, and we respect it.
items.share: is a bona fide Ticket Tycoon

items.name: The Wooden Spoon
items.blurb: Traditionally awarded for dead last. Stir with pride.

items.name: Participation Trophy
items.blurb: You showed up. Frankly, that's more than most.

items.name: Bronze Medal
items.blurb: Third place is the first winner from the bottom. Shiny.

items.name: Blue Ribbon
items.blurb: Best in show. The show being: messing around online.

items.name: Silver Medal
items.blurb: So close to gold you can taste the aluminum.

items.name: Gold Medal
items.blurb: Heavy is the neck that wears the gold.

items.name: The Golden Cup
items.blurb: Fill it with juice. You earned juice.

items.name: Championship Belt
items.blurb: Enormous. Impractical. Perfect. Do not sit down.

items.name: Hall of Fame Plaque
items.blurb: Immortalized in brushed pixel-brass. Forever-ish.

items.name: Certificate of Excessive Leisure
items.blurb: This document certifies that you have relaxed too hard.

items.name: Notarized Nonsense
items.blurb: Stamped, sealed, and legally meaningless. Beautiful.
items.share: holds a page of Notarized Nonsense

items.name: Certified Genius (Provisional)
items.blurb: Terms and conditions apply. Genius may vary by toy.

items.name: Employee of the Month
items.blurb: You don't work here. And yet. Congratulations.
items.share: was named Employee of the Month

items.name: Doctor of Fun
items.blurb: A doctorate in enjoying yourself. Please, call you Doctor.

items.name: Master of the Arcade
items.blurb: A degree in nonsense, printed on the finest imaginary paper.

items.name: Fortune Cookie
items.blurb: Crack it open for a fresh fortune. Re-roll any time.

items.name: Scroll of Prophecy
items.blurb: A longer, more dramatic fortune. Very portentous.

items.name: Magic 8-Prize
items.blurb: Ask again later. Actually, ask again right now. And now.

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.blurb: The mists part. Your future arcade self appears. Re-gaze freely.

items.name: Rubber Duck
items.blurb: The classic. Equip it and it paddles after your cursor everywhere.

items.name: Googly Eyes
items.blurb: A pair of eyes that watch your cursor from the corner. Unsettling. Great.
items.share: put googly eyes on the whole website

items.name: Fairy Dust
items.blurb: A trail of glitter follows your cursor across every page.

items.name: Bubble Trail
items.blurb: Soft bubbles rise from your cursor as you move.

items.name: Confetti Fingers
items.blurb: Every single click bursts a shower of confetti. Everywhere.

items.name: Sticker Pack
items.blurb: Click anywhere to fling a random sticker that tumbles off-screen.

items.name: Whoopee Cushion
items.blurb: A squeak on every click. The pinnacle of comedy. Toggle off before meetings.
items.share: armed every click with a whoopee cushion

items.name: Fireflies
items.blurb: A few fireflies drift and blink gently around your screen.
items.share: let fireflies loose on the site

items.name: Snow Flurry
items.blurb: A gentle snowfall drifts down across every page.

items.name: Blossom Drift
items.blurb: Cherry blossom petals drift softly across the whole site.
items.share: filled the site with cherry blossoms

items.name: Mood Lighting
items.blurb: The screen edges glow through slowly shifting mood colors.

items.name: Stardust
items.blurb: A faint field of drifting stars behind everything.

items.name: Disco Ball
items.blurb: A pocket disco ball sways up top and throws colored light around.

items.name: Retro CRT
items.blurb: A subtle CRT overlay — scanlines and a soft vignette, everywhere.
items.share: put the whole site on a retro CRT

items.name: Giant Foam Finger
items.blurb: You're #1. The finger says so. The finger cannot lie.

items.name: Party Hat
items.blurb: Every day is a small victory. Dress accordingly.

items.name: Pocket Pet Rock
items.blurb: Low maintenance. Deeply loyal. Currently sitting there.

items.name: Mystery Box
items.blurb: It's a box. The mystery is why you wanted it. And yet you do.

items.name: Big Ol' Trophy Fish
items.blurb: It was THIS big. Mounted for posterity. Does not smell.

items.name: The Golden Ticket
items.blurb: One shimmering ticket to rule them all. Purely decorative, wildly enviable.

items.name: Lifetime Achievement
items.blurb: For a life richly spent on tiny web toys. We salute you.

items.name: The Giant Plush
items.blurb: It's bigger than the counter. It's bigger than you. You won it anyway.

items.name: Crown of the Arcade
items.blurb: Heavy lies the head that farmed six thousand tickets.
items.share: was crowned ruler of the arcade

items.name: Key to the Arcade
items.blurb: Ceremonial. Opens nothing. Means everything.
items.share: was handed the Key to the Arcade

items.name: The Whole Arcade
items.blurb: You didn't win a prize. You bought the building. Staff included (they're fine).

items.name: The Actual Moon
items.blurb: Redeemable for the moon. Delivery not included, or possible. Ultimate flex.
items.share: redeemed their tickets for the Moon

fortunes: A great combo is in your near future.
The perfect circle exists. You will draw it. Not today.
Beware of tempting side quests. Beware more of ignoring them.
Your next high score is closer than it appears.
Somewhere, a ninja star has your name on it. Duck.
You will find exactly the toy you didn't know you needed.
Patience: the marble always reaches the bottom.
A quiet minute of play is worth an hour of scrolling.
The tickets you seek were inside you all along. And also in Nova Coil.
Today's small win is tomorrow's fond memory.
The gong tolls for those who forget to dodge.
You are one swipe away from greatness. Or a nap. Both are good.
The counter smiles upon you. The counter is a webpage, but still.
Do the fun thing. That is the whole fortune.
A duck will follow you today. You will allow it.
Great things come to those who click.
The high score is a lie you tell yourself, beautifully.
